infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Japanese Learning needs microphone access so you can speak vocabulary words and get instant pronunciation feedback.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Japanese Learning uses speech recognition to check whether you pronounced Japanese vocabulary correctly.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Japanese Learning to use the microphone for pronunciation practice.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Japanese Learning to use speech recognition for pronunciation practice.
